mission_types.name: Bug Extermination
mission_types.description: Clear out a bug-infested zone and eliminate all hostile contacts
objectives: Eliminate all bugs in the zone
special_rules: Bugs spawn in waves every 2 rounds
Last bug may attempt to flee and must be hunted down
Area is contaminated - environmental hazards present

mission_types.name: Colonist Rescue
mission_types.description: Extract trapped colonists from an infested facility before time runs out
objectives: Hold extraction zone until transport arrives
special_rules: Colonists are unarmed civilians with Toughness 3, Speed 4"
Bugs prioritize attacking colonists over soldiers
Time pressure: +1 deployment point every 2 rounds
Extraction zone must be defended for 2 full rounds

mission_types.name: Intelligence Gathering
mission_types.description: Infiltrate bug territory and gather data on hive activity
objectives: Plant 3 scanner devices in marked locations

victory_conditions.primary: At least 2 scanners planted and data retrieved

rewards.intelligence_bonus: Reveal infestation level and hive locations

special_rules: Stealth Mechanics: Soldiers can move undetected if 12"+ from bugs
Detection Accumulation: Loud actions (gunfire, explosions) add detection points
Alert Level: At 3 detection points, bugs swarm in (double deployment points)
Scanner Placement: Requires 1 action within 2" of objective marker

mission_types.name: Hive Sabotage
mission_types.description: Plant explosives in a bug hive and destroy their breeding chambers
special_rules: Hive Interior: Tight corridors, limited sightlines (18" max)
Spawn Points: Bugs can emerge from vents and walls
Detonation Timer: 4 rounds after charges armed
Escape Rush: Double speed movement allowed during extraction
Hive Collapse: Any soldier not extracted takes 2D6 damage

mission_types.name: Perimeter Defense
mission_types.description: Hold a critical position against endless waves of bugs
objectives: Defend objective point for required duration

rewards.defensive_equipment_bonus: Gain Sentry Gun or Breach Charges

special_rules: Wave Spawning: New wave every 2 rounds with increasing strength
Defensive Positions: +1 cover bonus in prepared positions
Ammo Depletion: Every 2 rounds, roll 1D6. On 1-2, ammo runs low (-1 shots)
Reinforcements: Can call for ammo drop (costs 1 command point)
Last Stand: If position breached, all soldiers gain +1 Combat Skill

mission_types.name: VIP Escort
mission_types.description: Protect a high-value target through bug-infested territory
objectives: Escort VIP from start point to extraction
special_rules: VIP Stats: Toughness 3, Speed 4", Combat Skill +1, carries pistol
Priority Target: Bugs prioritize attacking VIP over soldiers
Bodyguard Bonus: Soldier within 2" of VIP can intercept attacks
VIP Panic: If VIP panics, may refuse to move (requires rally action)
Danger Zones: Must pass through 3 marked zones that trigger ambushes

mission_types.name: Medical Supply Recovery
mission_types.description: Recover critical medical supplies from an overrun medical facility
objectives: Search facility for supply caches (4 locations)

victory_conditions.bonus: Find experimental combat drugs (roll 5-6 on search)

rewards.combat_drug_bonus: +1 to all stats for next mission (if found)

special_rules: Search Action: Requires 1 action while within 2" of search location
Random Contents: Roll 1D6 per crate (1-3: Med Kit, 4-5: 2 Med Kits, 6: Combat Drugs)
Infested Rooms: Each new room entered triggers bug spawn (1D3 Worker Bugs)
Heavy Crates: Soldiers carrying crates have -2" movement
Drop Crates: If soldier carrying crate is hit, roll 1D6. On 1-2, crate damaged

mission_types.name: Hive Recon
mission_types.description: Scout bug hive and map its structure without engaging

rewards.intelligence_bonus: Next mission against this hive gets +2 deployment points for squad
rewards.tactical_advantage: Choose deployment zone in next mission

special_rules: Observation: Must spend 2 rounds within 12" of entry point to survey
Stealth Movement: Can only move at half speed to remain undetected
Motion Tracker Essential: Without Motion Tracker, -2 to detection rolls
If Detected: Mission continues but victory conditions change to 'Extract with data'
Bug Patrols: Roll 1D6 each round. On 6, patrol approaches (must hide or evade)

mission_types.name: Xenoarcheology Site Defense
mission_types.description: Protect scientists excavating alien artifacts while bugs swarm the dig site

difficulty_modifiers.artifact_attraction: Bugs gain +2" speed when within 12" of artifacts

special_rules: Scientist Stats: Toughness 3, Speed 3", unarmed, panics easily
Extraction Progress: Track progress (6 rounds = 100%)
Artifact Disturbance: Bugs are attracted to artifacts, prioritize dig sites
Scientific Equipment: Cannot be abandoned, slows evacuation
Panic Cascade: If 1 scientist panics, others must make morale check

mission_types.name: Bug Nest Assault
mission_types.description: Direct assault on a confirmed bug nest to prevent hive expansion
special_rules: Breeding Chambers: Destructible objectives (Armor 5, 10 HP each)
Chamber Destruction: Requires explosives or 3 rounds of sustained fire
Spawn Surge: Destroying chamber spawns 2D3 Worker Bugs immediately
Queen's Rage: If Queen present and chamber destroyed, she enters berserker mode (+1 attack)
Nest Collapse Warning: After all chambers destroyed, 3 rounds to evacuate

modifiers.effect: Add infestation level to deployment points
Low morale (<40): +2 deployment points, High morale (>70): -1 deployment points
Defeat: +2 deployment points, Victory: No change, Flawless: -1 deployment points
1-2 days: Bugs unprepared (-1 DP), 5+ days: Bugs dug in (+2 DP)

table.effect: Visibility reduced to 12", Motion Tracker range -4"
Motion Trackers malfunction, 50% chance to work each use
All models in open take 1 damage each round
No darkness, +1 to detection, bugs gain +1 Speed

special_mission_complications.description: Roll 1D6 at start of mission for complications (on 5-6)

complications.name: Civilian Presence
complications.effect: 1D3 panicked civilians on map, must be protected or extracted

complications.name: Equipment Malfunction
complications.effect: One random piece of equipment per soldier malfunctions (50% chance to work)

complications.name: Environmental Hazard
complications.effect: Roll on hazard table, hazard is active throughout mission

complications.name: Time Pressure
complications.effect: Reduce mission time limit by 2 rounds

complications.name: Intel Failure
complications.effect: Bug deployment is hidden, use blips until first contact

campaign_mission_progression.description: Suggested mission flow for Bug Hunt campaign

phases.narrative: Squad arrives at infested colony, assesses threat, begins operations
Infestation spreading, defensive operations, gather intelligence
Push back against bugs, destroy nests, reduce infestation
Locate and destroy Queen, end infestation permanently

mission_rewards_scaling.description: Rewards scale with difficulty and performance
